name: Car Tuner 2020
short_description: Car Tuner 2020 is all about building the car you have always wanted. Customize, upgrade, and fine-tune every detail to match your style. From visual changes to performance improvements, every decision shapes your machine.
detailed_description:
Car Tuner 2020 is all about building the car you have always wanted.
Customize, upgrade, and fine-tune every detail to match your style. From visual changes to performance improvements, every decision shapes your machine.

Take your car apart, install new parts, apply fresh colors and eye-catching stickers, then bring it to the track and see how it performs. Test your setup, improve it, and keep pushing for the perfect build.

Whether you want a stylish street machine or a track-ready beast, Car Tuner 2020 gives you the tools to create your dream car.

Features

  • Customize your car with different colors

  • Add cool stickers and visual details

  • Disassemble your vehicle and rebuild it

  • Buy new parts in the shop

  • Upgrade and improve your car

  • Test your setup on the race track

Build it. Tune it. Test it. Perfect it.
